ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome where the gene is located */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "strand" TEXT /* Strand of the gene (e.g., +, -) */,
  "gene_length" INTEGER /* Length of the gene */,
  "gene_biotype" TEXT /* Biotype of the gene (e.g., protein_coding, lncRNA) */,
  "gene_expression_level" TEXT /* Expression level of the gene */,
  "gene_publication" TEXT /* References to publications related to the gene */,
  "gene_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fusion_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fusion type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the fusion type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fusion type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fusion_directions" (
  "direction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fusion direction */,
  "direction_name" TEXT /* Name of the fusion direction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fusion direction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("direction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genomic_sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genomic site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the genomic site */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genomic site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fusion_confidences" (
  "confidence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each confidence level */,
  "confidence_name" TEXT /* Name of the confidence level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the confidence level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("confidence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reading_frames" (
  "frame_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reading frame */,
  "frame_name" TEXT /* Name of the reading frame */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reading frame */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frame_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "fusion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene fusion being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the gene fusion */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the gene fusion was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user's device */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user's session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "filters" (
  "filter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each filter */,
  "filter_name" TEXT /* Name of the filter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the filter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("filter_id")
)
